window_policy: Use valid rows where 1 <= bet_num <= 20. Later bet numbers are not used to replace invalid or missing early bets.

features.first_bet_datetime: Datetime of the earliest valid bet in the customer's first-20 bet_num window.
features.twentieth_bet_datetime: Datetime of valid bet_num 20 when present; null otherwise.
features.bets_used: Count of valid records included in the first-20 window.
features.total_betting_amount: Sum of betting_amount across included valid rows.
features.mean_betting_amount: Mean betting_amount across included valid rows.
features.mean_price: Mean decimal odds price across included valid rows.
features.pct_racing: Share of included valid rows where category is racing.
features.pct_cash: Share of included valid rows where stake_type is cash.
features.pct_return: Share of included valid rows where bet_result is return.
features.total_payout: Sum of payout across included valid rows.
features.total_return_for_entain: Sum of return_for_entain across included valid rows.
features.feature_generated_at: UTC timestamp at which the feature file was generated.
features.invalid_first20_count: Number of quarantined records with bet_num in the first-20 window for the same customer_id.
